promotion_decision: Promote Prediction final acceptance polish: topic-family evidence filter, recommendation vs prediction speech, conversation-language non-memory classification
notes: Promotion of ACM commit 15f5e77 (Prediction final acceptance polish) into aria_acm/. Evidence topic-family filter; recommendation speech distinct from prediction; conversation-language classified as CONVERSATION_MANAGEMENT (non-memory). Aria host routes conversation-language queries to language subsystem.
